summary: Verified Portal Photo Parity Bug Fix - Backend returns correct photo_url in both /api/beneficiary/family-connections and /api/estates endpoints. Frontend correctly renders benefactor photos in orbit visualization, estate cards, and family member list. All 8 backend tests pass. UI testing confirmed photos are displayed (not initials) - test data used a 1x1 yellow pixel as placeholder which appears as yellow circles.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/estates returns owner_photo_url for beneficiary estates
Backend: GET /api/estates returns benefactor_name for beneficiary estates
Backend: GET /api/beneficiary/family-connections returns photo_url for connected benefactors
Backend: Both endpoints return consistent photo data
Backend: Dual-role user can access both benefactor and beneficiary portals
Backend: Spouse benefactor has photo in profile
Frontend: Orbit visualization renders benefactor photo (img tag with base64 src)
Frontend: Estate card renders benefactor photo (img tag with base64 src)
Frontend: Family member list renders benefactor photo (img tag with base64 src)
Frontend: Login as benefactor who is also beneficiary - both portals accessible via sidebar switch
seed_data_creation: Used existing test users and estates from previous setup
context_for_next_testing_agent: The portal photo parity bug fix is verified working. Backend correctly returns photo_url in /api/beneficiary/family-connections and owner_photo_url in /api/estates. Frontend BeneficiaryHubPage.js correctly maps owner_photo_url to photo_url in the estates fallback path (lines 104-109), and OrbitVisualization.js checks both photo_url and owner_photo_url (line 348). The family member list also shows photos correctly. Test data uses a 1x1 yellow pixel as photo placeholder.

bug_fix_verification.issue: Benefactor's initials shown instead of uploaded photo
bug_fix_verification.fix_location: BeneficiaryHubPage.js lines 104-109, 199; OrbitVisualization.js line 348; estates.py lines 49-64, 121-125
bug_fix_verification.status: FIXED - Photos render correctly when photo_url is set
